product_overview: Keke Park System is a web application that lets drivers register, pay daily park fees, join a live loading queue, and lets admins review registrations and manage the queue. It provides separate driver and admin dashboards for those workflows.
core_goals: Allow drivers to self-register with personal and vehicle details and upload a passport photo.
Allow drivers to log in, view their profile and approval/payment status, pay the daily park fee, and join/monitor the live loading queue.
Allow admins to log in, review pending driver registrations, approve or reject drivers, view registered drivers, and operate the live queue (load first, complete loading).
Provide clear in-app validation and success/error feedback for user-driven input (registration, login, payment, queue actions).

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate a driver or admin using phone number and password and redirect to the appropriate dashboard based on role.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill the phone number field -> Fill the password field -> Click the Login button -> See a success toast and be redirected to /driver
Navigate to /login -> Fill the phone number field -> Fill the password field -> Click the Login button -> See a success toast and be redirected to /admin
Navigate to /login -> Fill the phone number field -> Fill the password field with incorrect credentials -> Click the Login button -> See an error toast indicating invalid credentials

features.name: Driver Registration
features.description: Let new drivers create an account by providing personal and vehicle information and uploading a passport photo; show inline validation and submission feedback.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill full name, phone, email, password, licence number, and plate number -> Upload a passport photo -> Click the Register button to submit -> See a success toast and be redirected to /login or prompted to await approval

Navigate to /register -> Fill full name, phone, and password but omit licence or plate number -> Upload a passport photo -> Click the Register button to submit -> Review inline validation messages highlighting missing fields

Navigate to /register -> Fill all required details -> Upload an unsupported or invalid passport photo file -> Click the Register button to submit -> Review inline validation message about the uploaded photo

features.name: Driver Dashboard
features.description: Provide logged-in drivers with their profile, payment status, ability to record daily payment, and live queue participation and position updates.
user_flows: Navigate to /driver after logging in -> Review profile details and passport photo -> Click Pay to record the daily park fee -> See payment status update for the day -> Click Join Queue Now to enter the live queue -> Watch queue position update until loading is complete -> Click logout to end the session and return to /login
Navigate to /driver after logging in -> Review payment and cooldown status -> Attempt to join the queue while in cooldown -> See a message or disabled action indicating cooldown prevents joining

features.name: Admin Queue Management
features.description: Give admins tools to inspect pending driver registrations, approve or reject drivers, view driver records, and operate the live loading queue (load first, complete loading).
user_flows: Navigate to /admin after logging in -> Switch between queue, pending approvals, and drivers tabs to inspect lists -> Review a pending driver's details -> Approve a pending driver -> Observe the pending list update -> Click Load First Driver to move the first waiting driver into loading -> Click Complete Loading to finish the active load -> Click logout to end the session and return to /login

Navigate to /admin after logging in -> Switch to pending approvals tab -> Review a pending driver's details -> Reject the pending driver due to missing information -> Observe the pending list update to remove the rejected driver

routes.description: Redirects visitors to the login page.
Driver or admin login page using phone number and password.
Driver self-service registration form with client-side validation and passport photo upload.
Driver dashboard for profile, payment status, and live queue participation.
Admin dashboard for approvals, live queue control, and driver records.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Logs a driver or admin into the system with phone number and password, then redirects by role.
user_interactions: Fill the phone number field.
Fill the password field.
Click the Login button.
See a success toast and redirect on valid credentials.
See an error toast when credentials are invalid.

features.name: Driver Registration
features.description: Lets a new driver register with personal details, vehicle details, password, and passport photo upload.
user_interactions: Fill full name, phone, email, password, licence number, and plate number.
Upload a passport photo.
Review inline validation messages.
Click the Register button to submit.
See a success or failure toast after submission.

features.name: Driver Dashboard
features.description: Shows the logged-in driver profile, daily payment status, queue position, and cooldown state.
user_interactions: Open the dashboard after login.
Review profile details and passport photo.
Click Pay to record the daily park fee.
Click Join Queue Now to enter the live queue.
Watch queue position update and logout when finished.

features.name: Admin Queue Management
features.description: Allows an authenticated admin to review pending drivers, manage the queue, and inspect driver records.
user_interactions: Open the admin dashboard after login.
Switch between queue, pending approvals, and drivers tabs.
Approve or reject pending drivers.
Click Load First Driver and Complete Loading in the live queue.
Logout from the admin portal.

known_limitations.issue: Admin workflows depend on an existing approved admin account and seeded data, but no admin bootstrap flow is exposed in the frontend.
known_limitations.impact: Automated testing may be unable to exercise admin-only paths on a fresh database without pre-seeded credentials.

known_limitations.issue: Driver dashboard actions rely on authenticated backend state and uploaded assets from prior registration.
known_limitations.impact: End-to-end coverage of payment and queue flows depends on successful account creation and approval in backend data.
